[{"backup":{"views":[{"view":"v_active_portal_cases","def":" SELECT id,

   FROM swift_v2.portal_candidate_cases
  WHERE insolvency_phase IS NULL OR (lower(insolvency_phase) <> ALL (ARRAY['distribution'::text, 'terminated'::text, 'dismissed_lack_of_assets'::text])) AND insolvency_phase !~~* '%verteilung%'::text AND insolvency_phase !~~* '%aufhebung%'::text AND insolvency_phase !~~* '%abweisung%mangels%masse%'::text;"},{"view":"v_cockpit_acquisition_inbox","def":" SELECT (('watch:'::text || wl.kind) || ':'::text) || wl.watch_id::text AS case_key,
    wl.kind,
    'watchlist'::text AS source,
    wl.watch_id AS source_id,
    wl.entity_id,
    wl.detection_id,
    wl.watch_id,
    true AS is_watched,
    wl.status AS watch_status,
    wl.status AS inbox_status,
    wl.display_title,
    wl.safe_display_label,
        CASE
            WHEN wl.kind = 'nachlass'::text THEN np.debtor_name
            ELSE NULL::text
        END AS person_name,
    NULL::date AS birth_date,
    wl.city,
    wl.bundesland,
    wl.court,
    wl.aktenzeichen,
    wl.latest_publication_date,
    wl.latest_announcement_type,
    wl.latest_phase,
    wl.phase_priority,
    wl.pre_verteilung_relevance,
    wl.administrator_name,
    wl.administrator_email,
    wl.administrator_phone,
    wl.administrator_address,
    wl.handelsregister_status,
    wl.bundesanzeiger_status,
    wl.financial_data_status,
    wl.source_quality_flags,
    wl.missing_data_flags,
    wl.outreach_ready,
    wl.outreach_blocked_reason,
    wl.created_at,
    wl.updated_at
   FROM swift_v2.v_cockpit_watchlist_internal wl
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT a.debtor_name
           FROM swift_v2.nachlass_detection_results d
             JOIN swift_v2.raw_insolvency_announcements a ON a.id::text = d.source_announcement_id
          WHERE wl.kind = 'nachlass'::text AND d.detection_id = wl.detection_id
         LIMIT 1) np ON true
UNION ALL
 SELECT 'newco:'::text || e.entity_id::text AS case_key,
    'company'::text AS kind,
    'new_company'::text AS source,
    e.entity_id AS source_id,
    e.entity_id,
    NULL::uuid AS detection_id,
    NULL::uuid AS watch_id,
    false AS is_watched,
    NULL::text AS watch_status,
    'neu'::text AS inbox_status,
    e.display_name AS display_title,
    e.display_name AS safe_display_label,
    NULL::text AS person_name,
    NULL::date AS birth_date,
    e.city,
    e.state AS bundesland,
    la.court,
    la.case_number AS aktenzeichen,
    la.announcement_date AS latest_publication_date,
    la.announcement_type_hint AS latest_announcement_type,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_label(la.announcement_type_hint, e.latest_phase_inferred) AS latest_phase,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_priority(la.announcement_type_hint, e.latest_phase_inferred) AS phase_priority,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_label(la.announcement_type_hint, e.latest_phase_inferred) = ANY (ARRAY['vorlaeufig'::text, 'eroeffnung'::text, 'berichtstermin'::text, 'pruefungstermin'::text, 'verwertung'::text]) AS pre_verteilung_relevance,
    adm.insolvency_administrator AS administrator_name,
    adm.insolvency_admin_email AS administrator_email,
    adm.insolvency_admin_phone AS administrator_phone,
    adm.insolvency_admin_address AS administrator_address,
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(hr.has_hr, false) THEN 'verified'::text
            ELSE 'missing'::text
        END AS handelsregister_status,
    'retired'::text AS bundesanzeiger_status,
    'unavailable'::text AS financial_data_status,
    array_remove(ARRAY[
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_administrator_email'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(hr.has_hr, false) THEN 'handelsregister_verified'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN la.case_number IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_aktenzeichen'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END], NULL::text) AS source_quality_flags,
    array_remove(ARRAY[
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NULL THEN 'no_administrator_email'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_administrator IS NULL THEN 'no_administrator_name'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN la.court IS NULL THEN 'no_court'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN la.case_number IS NULL THEN 'no_aktenzeichen'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN NOT COALESCE(hr.has_hr, false) THEN 'handelsregister_missing'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END], NULL::text) AS missing_data_flags,
    adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL AND (la.court IS NOT NULL OR la.case_number IS NOT NULL) AS outreach_ready,
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NULL THEN 'missing_recipient_email'::text
            WHEN la.court IS NULL AND la.case_number IS NULL THEN 'missing_case_reference'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END AS outreach_blocked_reason,
    COALESCE(la.announcement_date::timestamp with time zone, e.first_seen_at) AS created_at,
    e.last_seen_at AS updated_at
   FROM swift_v2.v_cockpit_companies e
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT a.court,
            a.case_number,
            a.announcement_type_hint,
            a.announcement_date
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements a
          WHERE a.entity_id = e.entity_id
          ORDER BY a.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST, a.scraped_at DESC NULLS LAST
         LIMIT 1) la ON true
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT a.insolvency_administrator,
            a.insolvency_admin_email,
            a.insolvency_admin_phone,
            a.insolvency_admin_address
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements a
          WHERE a.entity_id = e.entity_id AND (a.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL OR a.insolvency_administrator IS NOT NULL)
          ORDER BY a.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST
         LIMIT 1) adm ON true
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT true AS has_hr
           FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records h
          WHERE h.entity_id = e.entity_id
         LIMIT 1) hr ON true
  WHERE (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active)) AND la.announcement_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - 180) AND NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_company_watchlist w
          WHERE w.entity_id = e.entity_id AND w.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid))))
UNION ALL
 SELECT 'newnl:'::text || d.detection_id::text AS case_key,
    'nachlass'::text AS kind,
    'new_nachlass'::text AS source,
    d.detection_id AS source_id,
    d.entity_id,
    d.detection_id,
    NULL::uuid AS watch_id,
    false AS is_watched,
    NULL::text AS watch_status,
    'neu'::text AS inbox_status,
    NULL::text AS display_title,
    COALESCE('Nachlass · Az. '::text || a.case_number, 'Nachlassverfahren'::text) AS safe_display_label,
    a.debtor_name AS person_name,
    NULL::date AS birth_date,
    NULL::text AS city,
    NULL::text AS bundesland,
    a.court,
    a.case_number AS aktenzeichen,
    a.announcement_date AS latest_publication_date,
    a.announcement_type_hint AS latest_announcement_type,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_label(a.announcement_type_hint, NULL::text) AS latest_phase,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_priority(a.announcement_type_hint, NULL::text) AS phase_priority,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_label(a.announcement_type_hint, NULL::text) = ANY (ARRAY['vorlaeufig'::text, 'eroeffnung'::text, 'berichtstermin'::text, 'pruefungstermin'::text, 'verwertung'::text]) AS pre_verteilung_relevance,
    a.insolvency_admin_name AS administrator_name,
    a.insolvency_admin_email AS administrator_email,
    a.insolvency_admin_phone AS administrator_phone,
    NULL::text AS administrator_address,
    'not_applicable'::text AS handelsregister_status,
    'retired'::text AS bundesanzeiger_status,
    'unavailable'::text AS financial_data_status,
    array_remove(ARRAY[
        CASE
            WHEN a.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_administrator_email'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN a.case_number IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_aktenzeichen'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN a.debtor_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_person_name'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END], NULL::text) AS source_quality_flags,
    array_remove(ARRAY[
        CASE
            WHEN a.insolvency_admin_email IS NULL THEN 'no_administrator_email'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN a.court IS NULL THEN 'no_court'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN a.case_number IS NULL THEN 'no_aktenzeichen'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END, 'handelsregister_not_applicable'::text], NULL::text) AS missing_data_flags,
    a.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL AND (a.court IS NOT NULL OR a.case_number IS NOT NULL) AS outreach_ready,
        CASE
            WHEN a.insolvency_admin_email IS NULL THEN 'missing_recipient_email'::text
            WHEN a.court IS NULL AND a.case_number IS NULL THEN 'missing_case_reference'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END AS outreach_blocked_reason,
    d.created_at,
    d.updated_at
   FROM swift_v2.nachlass_detection_results d
     JOIN swift_v2.raw_insolvency_announcements a ON a.id::text = d.source_announcement_id
  WHERE COALESCE(d.is_nachlass_candidate, false) AND a.announcement_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - 180) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active AND me.nachlass_authorized)) AND NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_nachlass_watchlist w
          WHERE w.detection_id = d.detection_id AND w.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid))));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_ai_case_reviews","def":" SELECT a.review_id,
    a.watch_kind,
    a.watch_id,
    a.entity_id,
    a.detection_id,
    a.summary_ar,
    a.summary_de,
    a.acquisition_score,
    a.priority,
    a.reasoning_ar,
    a.risk_flags,
    a.recommended_next_action,
    a.confidence,
    a.model_provider,
    a.model_name,
    a.status,
    a.error_code,
    a.created_by,
    cp.display_name AS created_by_name,
    a.updated_by,
    up.display_name AS updated_by_name,
    a.created_at,
    a.updated_at,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_ai_case_review_events ev
          WHERE ev.review_id = a.review_id) AS event_count,
    ( SELECT max(ev.created_at) AS max
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_ai_case_review_events ev
          WHERE ev.review_id = a.review_id) AS latest_event_at
   FROM swift_v2.cockpit_ai_case_reviews a
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles cp ON cp.user_id = a.created_by
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles up ON up.user_id = a.updated_by
  WHERE (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active AND (a.watch_kind = 'company'::text OR me.nachlass_authorized)));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_ai_evaluations","def":" SELECT e.evaluation_id,
    e.entity_id,
    pe.display_name,
    pe.city,
    pe.state AS bundesland,
    pe.legal_form,
    e.acquisition_score,
    e.priority,
    e.phase_window,
    e.model_used,
    e.prompt_version,
    e.validation_status,
    e.publish_recommendation,
    e.recommended_next_action,
    r.public_teaser_de,
    COALESCE(r.premium_report_ar, e.premium_report_ar) AS premium_report_ar,
    e.company_summary_ar,
    e.reasoning_ar,
    e.raw_ai_output,
    e.missing_data,
    e.risk_flags,
    e.created_at,
    rq.publication_status,
    rq.review_id,
    r.premium_report_de,
    r.report_title_de,
    r.report_title_ar,
    r.report_status
   FROM swift_v2.ai_opportunity_evaluations e
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities pe ON pe.id = e.entity_id
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.v_opportunity_review_queue rq ON rq.evaluation_id = e.evaluation_id
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.acquisition_opportunity_reports r ON r.evaluation_id = e.evaluation_id;"},{"view":"v_cockpit_case_timeline_internal","def":" SELECT id AS event_id,
    entity_id,
    announcement_date AS publication_date,
    court,
    case_number AS aktenzeichen,
    announcement_type_hint AS announcement_type,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_label(announcement_type_hint) AS insolvency_phase,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_priority(announcement_type_hint) AS phase_priority,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_label(announcement_type_hint) = ANY (ARRAY['vorlaeufig'::text, 'eroeffnung'::text, 'berichtstermin'::text, 'pruefungstermin'::text, 'verwertung'::text]) AS is_pre_verteilung,
    opening_date,
    claims_deadline,
    insolvency_administrator AS administrator_name,
    insolvency_admin_email AS administrator_email,
    insolvency_admin_phone AS administrator_phone,
    insolvency_admin_address AS administrator_address,
    announcement_text IS NOT NULL AND length(btrim(announcement_text)) > 0 AS has_announcement_text
   FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements a
  WHERE entity_id IS NOT NULL AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_companies","def":" SELECT pe.id AS entity_id,
    pe.display_name,
    pe.legal_form,
    pe.city,
    pe.state,
    pe.country,
    pe.registry_court,
    pe.registry_type,
    pe.registry_number,
    pe.is_portal_publishable,
    pe.first_seen_at,
    pe.last_seen_at,
    eps.is_company_eligible_for_ai,
    eps.latest_phase_inferred,
    eps.company_ai_status,
    eps.custom_search_status
   FROM swift_v2.portal_entities pe
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.entity_pipeline_status eps ON eps.entity_id = pe.id
  WHERE pe.entity_type = 'company'::text;"},{"view":"v_cockpit_company_activity","def":" SELECT DISTINCT ON (entity_id) entity_id,
    summary_ar AS company_activity_summary_ar,
    'ai_company_enrichment'::text AS company_activity_source,
    generated_at AS company_activity_generated_at
   FROM swift_v2.entity_ai_company_enrichment e
  WHERE NULLIF(btrim(summary_ar), ''::text) IS NOT NULL AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active))
  ORDER BY entity_id, generated_at DESC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC NULLS LAST;"},{"view":"v_cockpit_company_announcements","def":" SELECT sn.entity_id,
    sn.id AS announcement_id,
    sn.proceeding_key,
    sn.court,
    sn.court_normalized,
    sn.case_number,
    sn.announcement_date,
    sn.announcement_type_hint,
    sn.announcement_text,
    sn.insolvency_administrator,
    sn.registry_court,
    sn.registry_type,
    sn.registry_number,
    sn.source_url
   FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements sn
     JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities pe ON pe.id = sn.entity_id AND pe.entity_type = 'company'::text;"},{"view":"v_cockpit_company_web_search","def":" SELECT DISTINCT ON (csr.entity_id) csr.entity_id,
    csr.search_completeness,
    csr.industry_inferred,
    csr.business_activity_summary_de,
    csr.business_activity_summary_en,
    csr.business_question_answered,
    csr.financial_question_answered,
    csr.activity_evidence,
    csr.financial_sources,
    csr.financial_history,
    csr.search_completed_at,
    csr.generated_by
   FROM swift_v2.custom_search_results csr
     JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities pe ON pe.id = csr.entity_id AND pe.entity_type = 'company'::text
  ORDER BY csr.entity_id, csr.search_completed_at DESC NULLS LAST;"},{"view":"v_cockpit_dashboard_search_internal","def":" SELECT vc.entity_id,
    vc.display_name AS display_title,
    vc.city,
    vc.state AS bundesland,
    vc.registry_court,
    la.court,
    la.case_number AS aktenzeichen,
    la.announcement_date AS latest_publication_date,
    la.announcement_type_hint AS latest_announcement_type,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_label(la.announcement_type_hint) AS latest_phase,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_priority(la.announcement_type_hint) AS phase_priority,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_label(la.announcement_type_hint) = ANY (ARRAY['vorlaeufig'::text, 'eroeffnung'::text, 'berichtstermin'::text, 'pruefungstermin'::text, 'verwertung'::text]) AS pre_verteilung_relevance,
    act.summary_ar AS company_activity_ar,
    adm.insolvency_administrator AS administrator_name,
    adm.insolvency_admin_email AS administrator_email,
    adm.insolvency_admin_firm AS administrator_firm,
    adm.insolvency_administrator IS NOT NULL OR adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL AS has_administrator,
    vc.first_seen_at,
    vc.last_seen_at
   FROM swift_v2.v_cockpit_companies vc
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT a.court,
            a.case_number,
            a.announcement_type_hint,
            a.announcement_date
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements a
          WHERE a.entity_id = vc.entity_id
          ORDER BY a.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST, a.scraped_at DESC NULLS LAST
         LIMIT 1) la ON true
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT a.insolvency_administrator,
            a.insolvency_admin_email,
            a.insolvency_admin_firm
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements a
          WHERE a.entity_id = vc.entity_id AND (a.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL OR a.insolvency_administrator IS NOT NULL)
          ORDER BY a.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST
         LIMIT 1) adm ON true
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT e.summary_ar
           FROM swift_v2.entity_ai_company_enrichment e
          WHERE e.entity_id = vc.entity_id AND NULLIF(btrim(e.summary_ar), ''::text) IS NOT NULL
          ORDER BY e.generated_at DESC NULLS LAST, e.created_at DESC NULLS LAST
         LIMIT 1) act ON true
  WHERE (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_data_coverage_summary","def":" WITH gate AS (
         SELECT 1 AS ok
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles p
          WHERE p.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND p.is_active
         LIMIT 1
        )
 SELECT now() AS generated_at,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_entities) AS entities_total,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_entities
          WHERE portal_entities.entity_type = 'company'::text) AS entities_company,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_entities
          WHERE portal_entities.entity_type = 'natural_person'::text) AS entities_natural_person,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_entities
          WHERE portal_entities.entity_type = 'unknown'::text) AS entities_unknown_type,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_entities
          WHERE portal_entities.data_sensitivity = 'normal'::text) AS entities_sensitivity_normal,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_entities
          WHERE portal_entities.data_sensitivity IS DISTINCT FROM 'normal'::text) AS entities_restricted,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_entities
          WHERE portal_entities.entity_type = 'company'::text AND portal_entities.data_sensitivity = 'normal'::text AND portal_entities.is_portal_publishable) AS company_public_eligible,
    ( SELECT count(DISTINCT entity_source_links.entity_id) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.entity_source_links) AS entities_with_source_links,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_entities pe
          WHERE NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
                   FROM swift_v2.entity_source_links l
                  WHERE l.entity_id = pe.id))) AS entities_missing_links,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.company_cases) AS company_cases_total,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_candidate_cases) AS portal_candidate_cases_total,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.uncertain_cases) AS uncertain_cases_total,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements) AS announcements_total,
    ( SELECT max(source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.announcement_date) AS max
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements) AS announcements_latest_date,
    ( SELECT max(source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.scraped_at) AS max
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements) AS announcements_latest_scraped_at,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements
          WHERE source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.entity_id IS NOT NULL) AS announcements_linked,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements
          WHERE source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.entity_id IS NULL) AS announcements_unlinked,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements
          WHERE source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.subject_type = 'company'::text) AS announcements_company,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements
          WHERE source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.subject_type = 'natural_person'::text) AS announcements_natural_person,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records) AS hr_records_total,
    ( SELECT count(DISTINCT source_handelsregister_records.entity_id) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records
          WHERE source_handelsregister_records.entity_id IS NOT NULL) AS hr_entities_verified,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_entities pe
          WHERE pe.entity_type = 'company'::text AND NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
                   FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records h
                  WHERE h.entity_id = pe.id))) AS hr_companies_missing,
    ( SELECT max(source_handelsregister_records.fetched_at) AS max
           FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records) AS hr_latest_fetched_at,
    round(100.0 * (( SELECT count(DISTINCT source_handelsregister_records.entity_id) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records
          WHERE source_handelsregister_records.entity_id IS NOT NULL))::numeric / NULLIF(( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_entities
          WHERE portal_entities.entity_type = 'company'::text), 0)::numeric, 1) AS hr_verification_rate,
    'retired'::text AS bundesanzeiger_status,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.enrichment_jobs) AS jobs_total,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.enrichment_jobs
          WHERE enrichment_jobs.status = 'pending'::text) AS jobs_pending,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.enrichment_jobs
          WHERE enrichment_jobs.status = 'running'::text) AS jobs_running,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.enrichment_jobs
          WHERE enrichment_jobs.status = 'done'::text) AS jobs_done,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.enrichment_jobs
          WHERE enrichment_jobs.status = 'dead_letter'::text) AS jobs_dead_letter,
    ( SELECT max(enrichment_jobs.created_at) AS max
           FROM swift_v2.enrichment_jobs) AS jobs_latest_created_at,
    ( SELECT max(enrichment_jobs.updated_at) AS max
           FROM swift_v2.enrichment_jobs) AS jobs_latest_updated_at,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_candidate_cases
          WHERE portal_candidate_cases.portal_status = 'portal_candidate'::text) AS portal_candidates_ready,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_candidate_cases
          WHERE portal_candidate_cases.portal_status = 'needs_manual_review'::text) AS portal_candidates_review,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.portal_entities
          WHERE portal_entities.entity_type = 'natural_person'::text AND portal_entities.data_sensitivity = 'normal'::text) AS natural_person_normal_sensitivity
   FROM gate;"},{"view":"v_cockpit_enrichment_jobs","def":" SELECT j.job_id,
    j.job_type,
    j.status,
    j.priority,
    j.attempt_count,
    j.max_attempts,
    j.error_message,
    j.run_after,
    j.created_at,
    j.updated_at,
    j.entity_id,
        CASE
            WHEN pe.entity_type = 'company'::text THEN pe.display_name
            ELSE NULL::text
        END AS company_display_name,
    pe.entity_type IS DISTINCT FROM 'company'::text AS entity_is_restricted
   FROM swift_v2.enrichment_jobs j
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities pe ON pe.id = j.entity_id;"},{"view":"v_cockpit_inbox_v3","def":" SELECT id AS case_id,
    announcement_date,
    court,
    case_number,
    COALESCE(company_legal_name, debtor_name) AS company_name,
    debtor_name,
    debtor_city,
    company_address,
    legal_form,
    registry_court,
    registry_type,
    registry_number,
    announcement_type_hint,
    insolvency_phase,
    is_pre_verteilung,
    COALESCE(insolvency_admin_name, insolvency_administrator) AS admin_name,
    COALESCE(insolvency_admin_email, "substring"(announcement_text, '[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}'::text)) AS admin_email,
    COALESCE(insolvency_admin_phone, "substring"(announcement_text, '(?:Tel\.?|Telefon|Fon|Ruf)[^0-9+]{0,6}([+0-9][0-9 /().\-]{5,})'::text)) AS admin_phone,
    COALESCE(insolvency_admin_address, insolvency_administrator) AS admin_address_hint,
    claims_deadline,
    opening_date,
    announcement_text,
    is_watched,
    company_description_ar,
    COALESCE(insolvency_admin_email, "substring"(announcement_text, '[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}'::text)) IS NOT NULL AND (court IS NOT NULL OR case_number IS NOT NULL) AS outreach_ready,
    updated_at
   FROM apify_cases c
  WHERE is_pre_verteilung IS TRUE AND COALESCE(is_ignored, false) = false AND COALESCE(is_closed, false) = false AND announcement_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - 120);"},{"view":"v_cockpit_insolvency_administrators_internal","def":" SELECT id AS administrator_id,
    display_name,
    firm,
    email,
    phone,
    address,
    city,
    postal_code,
    source_count,
    first_seen_at,
    last_seen_at,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.insolvency_administrator_mentions m
          WHERE m.administrator_id = ad.id) AS latest_cases_count,
    email IS NOT NULL AS has_email,
    phone IS NOT NULL AS has_phone,
    address IS NOT NULL AS has_address,
    firm IS NOT NULL AS has_firm,
    quality_status,
    quality_reason,
    is_visible
   FROM swift_v2.insolvency_administrators ad
  WHERE is_visible = true AND (quality_status <> ALL (ARRAY['invalid'::text, 'quarantined'::text])) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_keyword_alert_matches","def":" SELECT match_id,
    rule_id,
    entity_id,
    announcement_id,
    matched_keywords,
    announcement_date,
    company_name,
    court,
    case_number,
    phase,
    administrator_name,
    matched_at,
    email_queued_at,
    email_sent_at,
    status
   FROM swift_v2.cockpit_keyword_alert_matches m
  WHERE user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_keyword_alert_rules","def":" SELECT rule_id,
    name,
    keywords,
    match_mode,
    is_active,
    email_enabled,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_keyword_alert_matches m
          WHERE m.rule_id = r.rule_id) AS match_count
   FROM swift_v2.cockpit_keyword_alert_rules r
  WHERE user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_my_tasks","def":" SELECT t.task_id,
    t.title,
    t.description,
    t.task_type,
    t.priority,
    t.status,
    t.assigned_to,
    ap.display_name AS assigned_to_name,
    ap.email AS assigned_to_email,
    t.created_by,
    cp.display_name AS created_by_name,
    cp.email AS created_by_email,
    t.related_kind,
    t.related_id,
    t.related_label,
    t.source_view,
    t.due_at,
    t.completed_at,
    t.created_at,
    t.updated_at,
    GREATEST(0, CURRENT_DATE - t.created_at::date) AS age_days,
        CASE
            WHEN t.due_at IS NULL THEN 'no_due_date'::text
            WHEN t.due_at::date < CURRENT_DATE THEN 'overdue'::text
            WHEN t.due_at::date = CURRENT_DATE THEN 'today'::text
            WHEN t.due_at::date = (CURRENT_DATE + 1) THEN 'tomorrow'::text
            ELSE 'upcoming'::text
        END AS due_bucket,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_task_events e
          WHERE e.task_id = t.task_id) AS event_count,
    ( SELECT max(e.created_at) AS max
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_task_events e
          WHERE e.task_id = t.task_id) AS latest_event_at
   FROM swift_v2.cockpit_tasks t
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles ap ON ap.user_id = t.assigned_to
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles cp ON cp.user_id = t.created_by
  WHERE (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles p
          WHERE p.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND p.is_active));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_my_watchlist","def":" SELECT 'company'::text AS kind,
    w.watch_id,
    w.entity_id AS subject_id,
    NULL::uuid AS detection_id,
    pe.display_name AS title,
    pe.city,
    pe.state AS bundesland,
    NULL::integer AS nachlass_score,
    NULL::text AS estate_summary_ar,
    NULL::text[] AS estate_asset_categories,
    NULL::date AS opportunity_window_start,
    NULL::date AS opportunity_window_end,
    w.note,
    w.status,
    w.next_follow_up_at,
    w.status_changed_at,
    w.created_at,
    w.updated_at
   FROM swift_v2.cockpit_company_watchlist w
     JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities pe ON pe.id = w.entity_id
  WHERE w.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid))
UNION ALL
 SELECT 'nachlass'::text AS kind,
    w.watch_id,
    NULL::uuid AS subject_id,
    w.detection_id,
    NULL::text AS title,
    NULL::text AS city,
    NULL::text AS bundesland,
    d.deceased_estate_signal_score AS nachlass_score,
    d.estate_summary_ar,
    d.estate_asset_categories,
    d.opportunity_window_start,
    d.opportunity_window_end,
    w.note,
    w.status,
    w.next_follow_up_at,
    w.status_changed_at,
    w.created_at,
    w.updated_at
   FROM swift_v2.cockpit_nachlass_watchlist w
     JOIN swift_v2.nachlass_detection_results d ON d.detection_id = w.detection_id
  WHERE w.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles p
          WHERE p.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND p.is_active AND p.nachlass_authorized));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_nachlass_review_full","def":" SELECT r.review_id,
    r.review_status,
    r.priority,
    r.assigned_to,
    r.reviewed_by,
    r.reviewed_at,
    r.decision_reason,
    r.review_notes,
    r.published_at,
    r.unpublished_at,
    r.expired_at,
    r.created_at AS review_created_at,
    r.updated_at AS review_updated_at,
    d.detection_id,
    d.entity_id,
    d.is_nachlass_candidate,
    d.deceased_estate_signal_score,
    d.detection_reasoning_ar,
    d.source_excerpt,
    d.opportunity_window_start,
    d.opportunity_window_end,
    d.delete_after,
        CASE
            WHEN d.opportunity_window_end IS NULL THEN NULL::integer
            ELSE d.opportunity_window_end - CURRENT_DATE
        END AS days_remaining_in_window,
    ann.case_number,
    ann.case_type,
    ann.court,
    ann.court_normalized,
    ann.announcement_date,
    ann.announcement_type_hint,
    ann.debtor_name AS deceased_name,
    ann.debtor_city AS deceased_city,
    ann.insolvency_admin_name,
    ann.insolvency_admin_email,
    ann.insolvency_admin_phone,
    ann.announcement_text,
    ann.source_url,
    d.estate_summary_ar,
    d.estate_asset_categories,
    d.estate_extracted_at
   FROM swift_v2.nachlass_opportunity_reviews r
     JOIN swift_v2.nachlass_detection_results d ON d.detection_id = r.detection_id
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.raw_insolvency_announcements ann ON ann.id::text = d.source_announcement_id
  WHERE (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active AND me.nachlass_authorized));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_nachlass_review_queue","def":" SELECT review_id,
    review_status,
    priority,
    assigned_to,
    reviewed_by,
    reviewed_at,
    decision_reason,
    review_notes,
    published_at,
    unpublished_at,
    expired_at,
    review_created_at,
    review_updated_at,
    detection_id,
    entity_id,
    is_nachlass_candidate,
    deceased_estate_signal_score,
    detection_reasoning_ar,
    opportunity_window_start,
    opportunity_window_end,
    delete_after,
    days_remaining_in_window,
    announcement_date,
    case_number,
    case_type,
    court,
    court_normalized,
    announcement_type_hint
   FROM swift_v2.v_nachlass_review_queue q
  WHERE (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active AND me.nachlass_authorized));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_nachlass_search_internal","def":" SELECT d.detection_id,
    d.source_announcement_id,
    r.debtor_name AS person_name,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(btrim(r.debtor_name), ''::text), 'Nachlassverfahren'::text) AS display_title,
    r.court,
    r.case_number AS aktenzeichen,
    r.announcement_date,
    r.announcement_type_hint AS announcement_type,
    d.deceased_estate_signal_score AS signal_score,
    d.opportunity_window_start,
    d.opportunity_window_end,
    d.estate_summary_ar AS summary_ar,
    d.estate_asset_categories,
    r.announcement_text IS NOT NULL AND length(btrim(r.announcement_text)) > 0 AS has_announcement_text,
    d.created_at,
    d.updated_at
   FROM swift_v2.nachlass_detection_results d
     JOIN swift_v2.raw_insolvency_announcements r ON r.id::text = d.source_announcement_id
  WHERE d.is_nachlass_candidate AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active AND me.nachlass_authorized));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_outreach_drafts","def":" SELECT d.draft_id,
    d.watch_kind,
    d.watch_id,
    d.entity_id,
    d.detection_id,
    d.recipient_name,
    d.recipient_email,
    d.recipient_source,
    d.subject,
    d.body,
    d.language,
    d.status,
    d.created_by,
    cp.display_name AS created_by_name,
    d.updated_by,
    up.display_name AS updated_by_name,
    d.created_at,
    d.updated_at,
    d.archived_at,
    ( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_outreach_events ev
          WHERE ev.draft_id = d.draft_id) AS event_count,
    ( SELECT max(ev.created_at) AS max
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_outreach_events ev
          WHERE ev.draft_id = d.draft_id) AS latest_event_at,
    COALESCE(d.metadata ->> 'generation_mode'::text, 'manual'::text) AS generation_mode,
    d.metadata ->> 'ai_model_name'::text AS ai_model_name
   FROM swift_v2.cockpit_outreach_drafts d
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles cp ON cp.user_id = d.created_by
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles up ON up.user_id = d.updated_by
  WHERE (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active AND (d.watch_kind = 'company'::text OR me.nachlass_authorized)));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_review_inbox","def":" SELECT publication_status,
    count(*) AS count
   FROM swift_v2.opportunity_publication_reviews
  GROUP BY publication_status;"},{"view":"v_cockpit_system_health","def":" SELECT check_key,
    check_group,
    status,
    severity,
    title,
    message,
    details,
    last_checked_at,
    next_check_at,
    resolved_at,
    updated_at
   FROM swift_v2.cockpit_system_health_checks h
  WHERE (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles p
          WHERE p.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND p.is_active));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_users","def":" SELECT user_id,
    display_name,
    email,
    role::text AS role,
    is_active
   FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles p
  WHERE is_active AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active));"},{"view":"v_cockpit_watchlist_internal","def":" SELECT 'company'::text AS kind,
    w.watch_id,
    w.entity_id AS subject_id,
    w.entity_id,
    NULL::uuid AS detection_id,
    w.status,
    w.note,
    w.next_follow_up_at,
    w.created_at,
    w.updated_at,
    e.display_name AS display_title,
    e.display_name AS safe_display_label,
    e.city,
    e.state AS bundesland,
    la.court,
    la.case_number AS aktenzeichen,
    la.announcement_date AS latest_publication_date,
    la.announcement_type_hint AS latest_announcement_type,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_label(la.announcement_type_hint, ph.phase) AS latest_phase,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_priority(la.announcement_type_hint, ph.phase) AS phase_priority,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_label(la.announcement_type_hint, ph.phase) = ANY (ARRAY['vorlaeufig'::text, 'eroeffnung'::text, 'berichtstermin'::text, 'pruefungstermin'::text, 'verwertung'::text]) AS pre_verteilung_relevance,
    adm.insolvency_administrator AS administrator_name,
    adm.insolvency_admin_email AS administrator_email,
    adm.insolvency_admin_phone AS administrator_phone,
    adm.insolvency_admin_address AS administrator_address,
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_administrator IS NOT NULL OR adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL THEN 'neu_insolvenz_announcement'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END AS administrator_source,
    NULL::text AS administrator_confidence,
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(hr.has_hr, false) THEN 'verified'::text
            ELSE 'missing'::text
        END AS handelsregister_status,
    COALESCE(hr.has_hr, false) AS handelsregister_verified,
    'retired'::text AS bundesanzeiger_status,
    'unavailable'::text AS financial_data_status,
    array_remove(ARRAY[
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_administrator_email'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(hr.has_hr, false) THEN 'handelsregister_verified'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN la.case_number IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_aktenzeichen'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END], NULL::text) AS source_quality_flags,
    array_remove(ARRAY[
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NULL THEN 'no_administrator_email'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_administrator IS NULL THEN 'no_administrator_name'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN la.court IS NULL THEN 'no_court'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN la.case_number IS NULL THEN 'no_aktenzeichen'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN NOT COALESCE(hr.has_hr, false) THEN 'handelsregister_missing'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END], NULL::text) AS missing_data_flags,
    adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL AND (la.court IS NOT NULL OR la.case_number IS NOT NULL) AS outreach_ready,
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NULL THEN 'missing_recipient_email'::text
            WHEN la.court IS NULL AND la.case_number IS NULL THEN 'missing_case_reference'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END AS outreach_blocked_reason
   FROM swift_v2.cockpit_company_watchlist w
     JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities e ON e.id = w.entity_id
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT p.phase
           FROM swift_v2.v_entity_insolvency_phase p
          WHERE p.entity_id = w.entity_id
         LIMIT 1) ph ON true
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT a.court,
            a.case_number,
            a.announcement_type_hint,
            a.announcement_date
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements a
          WHERE a.entity_id = w.entity_id
          ORDER BY a.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST, a.scraped_at DESC NULLS LAST
         LIMIT 1) la ON true
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT a.insolvency_administrator,
            a.insolvency_admin_email,
            a.insolvency_admin_phone,
            a.insolvency_admin_address
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements a
          WHERE a.entity_id = w.entity_id AND (a.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL OR a.insolvency_administrator IS NOT NULL)
          ORDER BY a.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST
         LIMIT 1) adm ON true
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT true AS has_hr
           FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records h
          WHERE h.entity_id = w.entity_id
         LIMIT 1) hr ON true
  WHERE w.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active))
UNION ALL
 SELECT 'nachlass'::text AS kind,
    w.watch_id,
    w.detection_id AS subject_id,
    d.entity_id,
    w.detection_id,
    w.status,
    w.note,
    w.next_follow_up_at,
    w.created_at,
    w.updated_at,
    NULL::text AS display_title,
    COALESCE('Nachlass · Az. '::text || la.case_number, 'Nachlassverfahren'::text) AS safe_display_label,
    NULL::text AS city,
    NULL::text AS bundesland,
    la.court,
    la.case_number AS aktenzeichen,
    la.announcement_date AS latest_publication_date,
    la.announcement_type_hint AS latest_announcement_type,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_label(la.announcement_type_hint, ph.phase) AS latest_phase,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_priority(la.announcement_type_hint, ph.phase) AS phase_priority,
    swift_v2.fn_cockpit_phase_label(la.announcement_type_hint, ph.phase) = ANY (ARRAY['vorlaeufig'::text, 'eroeffnung'::text, 'berichtstermin'::text, 'pruefungstermin'::text, 'verwertung'::text]) AS pre_verteilung_relevance,
    adm.insolvency_administrator AS administrator_name,
    adm.insolvency_admin_email AS administrator_email,
    adm.insolvency_admin_phone AS administrator_phone,
    adm.insolvency_admin_address AS administrator_address,
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_administrator IS NOT NULL OR adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL THEN 'neu_insolvenz_announcement'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END AS administrator_source,
    NULL::text AS administrator_confidence,
    'not_applicable'::text AS handelsregister_status,
    false AS handelsregister_verified,
    'retired'::text AS bundesanzeiger_status,
    'unavailable'::text AS financial_data_status,
    array_remove(ARRAY[
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_administrator_email'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN la.case_number IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_aktenzeichen'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END], NULL::text) AS source_quality_flags,
    array_remove(ARRAY[
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NULL THEN 'no_administrator_email'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_administrator IS NULL THEN 'no_administrator_name'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN la.court IS NULL THEN 'no_court'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN la.case_number IS NULL THEN 'no_aktenzeichen'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END, 'handelsregister_not_applicable'::text], NULL::text) AS missing_data_flags,
    adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL AND (la.court IS NOT NULL OR la.case_number IS NOT NULL) AS outreach_ready,
        CASE
            WHEN adm.insolvency_admin_email IS NULL THEN 'missing_recipient_email'::text
            WHEN la.court IS NULL AND la.case_number IS NULL THEN 'missing_case_reference'::text
            ELSE NULL::text
        END AS outreach_blocked_reason
   FROM swift_v2.cockpit_nachlass_watchlist w
     JOIN swift_v2.nachlass_detection_results d ON d.detection_id = w.detection_id
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT p.phase
           FROM swift_v2.v_entity_insolvency_phase p
          WHERE p.entity_id = d.entity_id
         LIMIT 1) ph ON true
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT a.court,
            a.case_number,
            a.announcement_type_hint,
            a.announcement_date
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements a
          WHERE a.entity_id = d.entity_id
          ORDER BY a.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST, a.scraped_at DESC NULLS LAST
         LIMIT 1) la ON true
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT a.insolvency_administrator,
            a.insolvency_admin_email,
            a.insolvency_admin_phone,
            a.insolvency_admin_address
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements a
          WHERE a.entity_id = d.entity_id AND (a.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL OR a.insolvency_administrator IS NOT NULL)
          ORDER BY a.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST
         LIMIT 1) adm ON true
  WHERE w.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.cockpit_user_profiles me
          WHERE me.user_id = (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND me.is_active AND me.nachlass_authorized));"},{"view":"v_company_ai_enrichment_queue","def":" SELECT pe.id AS entity_id,
    pe.display_name,
    pe.city,
    pe.state AS bundesland,
    csr.result_id AS custom_search_result_id,
    csr.search_completeness,
    csr.business_question_answered,
    csr.financial_question_answered,
    csr.input_hash AS custom_search_input_hash,
    csr.search_completed_at,
    eps.company_ai_status,
    eps.last_company_ai_at,
    COALESCE(eip.phase, 'unknown'::text) AS insolvency_phase
   FROM swift_v2.portal_entities pe
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.entity_pipeline_status eps ON eps.entity_id = pe.id
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.v_entity_insolvency_phase eip ON eip.entity_id = pe.id
     JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT c.result_id,
            c.entity_id,
            c.business_activity_summary_de,
            c.business_activity_summary_en,
            c.industry_inferred,
            c.activity_evidence,
            c.financial_history,
            c.financial_sources,
            c.business_question_answered,
            c.financial_question_answered,
            c.search_completeness,
            c.input_hash,
            c.generated_by,
            c.search_completed_at,
            c.created_at,
            c.updated_at
           FROM swift_v2.custom_search_results c
          WHERE c.entity_id = pe.id AND (c.search_completeness = ANY (ARRAY['partial'::text, 'sufficient'::text, 'strong'::text])) AND (c.business_question_answered OR c.financial_question_answered)
          ORDER BY c.search_completed_at DESC NULLS LAST, c.created_at DESC
         LIMIT 1) csr ON true
  WHERE pe.entity_type = 'company'::text AND pe.is_portal_publishable = true AND pe.data_sensitivity = 'normal'::text AND swift_v2.fn_is_company_eligible_for_ai(pe.id) AND (COALESCE(eip.phase, 'unknown'::text) <> ALL (ARRAY['late_stage'::text, 'masseunzulaenglichkeit'::text, 'dismissed_lack_of_assets'::text])) AND NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.entity_ai_company_enrichment ai
          WHERE ai.entity_id = pe.id AND ai.input_hash = csr.input_hash AND (ai.validation_status = ANY (ARRAY['passed'::text, 'needs_review'::text]))));"},{"view":"v_company_custom_search_queue","def":" SELECT pe.id AS entity_id,
    pe.display_name,
    pe.city,
    pe.state AS bundesland,
    pe.registry_court,
    pe.registry_type,
    pe.registry_number,
    pe.registry_identity_key,
    eps.custom_search_status,
    eps.company_ai_status,
    eps.last_custom_search_at,
    COALESCE(eps.custom_search_status, 'pending'::text) AS effective_status,
    pe.last_seen_at AS entity_last_seen_at,
    COALESCE(eip.phase, 'unknown'::text) AS insolvency_phase
   FROM swift_v2.portal_entities pe
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.entity_pipeline_status eps ON eps.entity_id = pe.id
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.v_entity_insolvency_phase eip ON eip.entity_id = pe.id
  WHERE pe.entity_type = 'company'::text AND pe.is_portal_publishable = true AND pe.data_sensitivity = 'normal'::text AND (COALESCE(eps.custom_search_status, 'pending'::text) = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::text, 'retry'::text, 'failed'::text])) AND (COALESCE(eip.phase, 'unknown'::text) <> ALL (ARRAY['late_stage'::text, 'masseunzulaenglichkeit'::text, 'dismissed_lack_of_assets'::text])) AND NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.custom_search_results csr
          WHERE csr.entity_id = pe.id AND (csr.search_completeness = ANY (ARRAY['partial'::text, 'sufficient'::text, 'strong'::text])) AND (csr.business_question_answered OR csr.financial_question_answered)));"},{"view":"v_daily_run_log","def":" SELECT run_id,
    run_date,
    started_at,
    finished_at,
    status,
    s1_status,
    s1_inserted_count,
    s1_duplicate_count,
    s1_failed_count,
    s2_status,
    s2_selected_count,
    s2_enriched_count,
    s2_failed_count,
    error_message,
    recovery_action,
    triggered_by,
    triggered_by_run_url,
    report,
    EXTRACT(epoch FROM finished_at - started_at)::integer AS duration_seconds
   FROM swift_v2.daily_run_log;"},{"view":"v_entity_insolvency_phase","def":" WITH src AS (
         SELECT s.entity_id,
            s.announcement_date,
            s.announcement_type_hint AS type_hint,
            s.announcement_text
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements s
             JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities pe ON pe.id = s.entity_id AND pe.entity_type = 'company'::text
          WHERE s.entity_id IS NOT NULL AND (s.announcement_type_hint IS NOT NULL OR s.announcement_text IS NOT NULL)
        ), latest_informative AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT ON (src.entity_id) src.entity_id,
            src.type_hint,
            src.announcement_text,
            src.announcement_date
           FROM src
          ORDER BY src.entity_id, src.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST
        )
 SELECT entity_id,
    type_hint,
    announcement_date,
        CASE
            WHEN type_hint = ANY (ARRAY['Schlusstermin'::text, 'Schlussverteilung'::text, 'Aufhebung'::text, 'Einstellung'::text, 'Nachtragsverteilung'::text, 'Verguetung'::text, 'Vergütungsfestsetzung'::text, 'Restschuldbefreiung'::text]) THEN 'late_stage'::text
            WHEN type_hint = ANY (ARRAY['Eroeffnung'::text, 'Eröffnung'::text]) THEN 'opening'::text
            WHEN type_hint = ANY (ARRAY['Pruefung'::text, 'Prüfungstermin'::text, 'Berichtstermin'::text]) THEN 'administrator_appointed'::text
            WHEN type_hint = ANY (ARRAY['Antrag'::text, 'Sicherungsmassnahmen'::text, 'Sicherungsmaßnahmen'::text, 'Anordnung'::text]) THEN 'preliminary_administration'::text
            WHEN announcement_text IS NOT NULL THEN swift_v2.fn_classify_insolvency_phase_from_text(announcement_text)
            ELSE 'unknown'::text
        END AS phase
   FROM latest_informative;"},{"view":"v_entity_link_quality","def":" SELECT e.entity_type,
    l.source_name,
    l.match_method,
    count(*) AS links,
    round(avg(l.match_confidence), 2) AS avg_confidence,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE l.match_confidence < 80) AS low_confidence_links
   FROM swift_v2.entity_source_links l
     JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities e ON e.id = l.entity_id
  GROUP BY e.entity_type, l.source_name, l.match_method;"},{"view":"v_evaluations_ready_for_promotion","def":" SELECT e.evaluation_id,
    e.entity_id,
    e.acquisition_score,
    e.priority,
    e.publish_recommendation,
    e.validation_status,
    e.missing_data,
    e.public_teaser_de,
    e.premium_report_ar,
    e.company_summary_ar,
    e.reasoning_ar,
    e.risk_flags,
    e.recommended_next_action,
    r.review_id AS publication_review_id,
    r.publication_status,
    pe.display_name AS entity_display_name
   FROM swift_v2.ai_opportunity_evaluations e
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.opportunity_publication_reviews r ON r.evaluation_id = e.evaluation_id
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities pe ON pe.id = e.entity_id
  WHERE (e.validation_status = ANY (ARRAY['needs_review'::text, 'approved'::text])) AND (e.publish_recommendation = ANY (ARRAY['publish_public_teaser'::text, 'publish_premium'::text])) AND COALESCE(e.acquisition_score, 0) >= 50 AND (e.missing_data IS NULL OR e.missing_data = '{}'::jsonb OR jsonb_typeof(e.missing_data) = 'object'::text AND e.missing_data = '{}'::jsonb) AND NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.acquisition_opportunity_reports ar
          WHERE ar.evaluation_id = e.evaluation_id)) AND (r.review_id IS NULL OR (r.publication_status <> ALL (ARRAY['rejected'::text, 'published'::text, 'unpublished'::text])));"},{"view":"v_handelsregister_candidate_review","def":" SELECT emc.id AS candidate_id,
    emc.candidate_source_record_id,
    emc.proposed_entity_id,
    emc.candidate_entity_id,
    emc.match_method,
    emc.match_confidence,
    emc.reason,
    emc.status,
    emc.created_at,
    hr.company_name AS hr_company_name,
    hr.registry_court AS hr_registry_court,
    hr.registry_type AS hr_registry_type,
    hr.registry_number AS hr_registry_number,
    hr.seat_city AS hr_seat_city,
    pe.display_name AS portal_display_name,
    pe.registry_identity_key AS portal_registry_identity_key
   FROM swift_v2.entity_match_candidates emc
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records hr ON hr.id::text = emc.candidate_source_record_id
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities pe ON pe.id = emc.proposed_entity_id
  WHERE emc.candidate_source_name = 'handelsregister_direct'::text AND emc.status = 'open'::text
  ORDER BY emc.created_at DESC;"},{"view":"v_handelsregister_enrichment_queue","def":" SELECT id AS entity_id,
    display_name,
    city,
    legal_form,
    registry_court,
    registry_type,
    registry_number,
    registry_identity_key,
        CASE
            WHEN registry_identity_key IS NOT NULL THEN 'lookup_by_registry'::text
            ELSE 'search_by_name_city'::text
        END AS recommended_lookup_method,
    match_status
   FROM swift_v2.portal_entities
  WHERE entity_type = 'company'::text AND is_portal_publishable = true;"},{"view":"v_handelsregister_error_review","def":" SELECT id AS source_record_id,
    registry_identity_key,
    registry_court,
    registry_type,
    registry_number,
    company_name,
    seat_city,
    created_at AS first_error_at,
    fetched_at AS last_error_at,
    fetched_at - created_at AS failing_for,
    raw_json ->> 'error_kind'::text AS last_error_kind,
    raw_json ->> 'error_message'::text AS last_error_message,
    raw_json ->> 'run_id'::text AS last_run_id
   FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records e
  WHERE source_name = 'handelsregister_direct'::text AND event_type = 'search_error'::text
  ORDER BY (fetched_at - created_at) DESC, fetched_at DESC;"},{"view":"v_handelsregister_no_result_review","def":" SELECT id,
    source_external_id,
    registry_court,
    registry_type,
    registry_number,
    registry_identity_key,
    company_name,
    seat_city,
    fetched_at,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    raw_json
   FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records hr
  WHERE source_name = 'handelsregister_direct'::text AND event_type = 'search_no_result'::text
  ORDER BY created_at DESC;"},{"view":"v_handelsregister_pending_queue","def":" SELECT q.entity_id,
    q.display_name,
    q.city,
    q.legal_form,
    q.registry_court,
    q.registry_type,
    q.registry_number,
    q.registry_identity_key,
    q.recommended_lookup_method,
    q.match_status
   FROM swift_v2.v_handelsregister_enrichment_queue q
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.entity_source_links esl ON esl.entity_id = q.entity_id AND esl.source_name = 'handelsregister_direct'::text
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records hr ON hr.source_name = 'handelsregister_direct'::text AND hr.event_type = 'search_no_result'::text AND hr.registry_identity_key = q.registry_identity_key AND hr.created_at >= (now() - '7 days'::interval)
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.entity_match_candidates emc ON emc.proposed_entity_id = q.entity_id AND emc.candidate_source_name = 'handelsregister_direct'::text AND emc.status = 'open'::text
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT max(e.fetched_at) AS last_error_at,
            min(e.created_at) AS first_error_at
           FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records e
          WHERE e.source_name = 'handelsregister_direct'::text AND e.event_type = 'search_error'::text AND e.registry_identity_key = q.registry_identity_key) err ON true
  WHERE esl.id IS NULL AND hr.id IS NULL AND emc.id IS NULL AND (err.last_error_at IS NULL OR now() >= (err.last_error_at +
        CASE
            WHEN (err.last_error_at - err.first_error_at) >= '3 days'::interval THEN '7 days'::interval
            ELSE '24:00:00'::interval
        END));"},{"view":"v_nachlass_detection_queue","def":" SELECT id AS source_announcement_id,
    proceeding_key,
    case_type,
    announcement_type_hint,
    announcement_date,
    scraped_at,
    case_number,
    court
   FROM swift_v2.raw_insolvency_announcements ra
  WHERE announcement_text IS NOT NULL AND length(announcement_text) >= 50 AND COALESCE(case_type, ''::text) <> 'COMPANY'::text AND NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.nachlass_detection_results ndr
          WHERE ndr.source_announcement_id = ra.id::text));"},{"view":"v_nachlass_publishable","def":" SELECT ndr.detection_id,
    ndr.source_announcement_id,
    ndr.entity_id,
    ndr.is_nachlass_candidate,
    ndr.deceased_estate_signal_score,
    ndr.detection_reasoning_ar,
    ndr.opportunity_window_start,
    ndr.opportunity_window_end,
    ndr.delete_after,
    r.review_id,
    r.review_status,
    r.reviewed_by,
    r.reviewed_at,
    r.published_at,
    r.unpublished_at
   FROM swift_v2.nachlass_detection_results ndr
     JOIN swift_v2.nachlass_opportunity_reviews r ON r.detection_id = ndr.detection_id
  WHERE (r.review_status = ANY (ARRAY['approved_internal'::text, 'published'::text])) AND r.unpublished_at IS NULL AND ndr.delete_after > now();"},{"view":"v_nachlass_review_queue","def":" SELECT r.review_id,
    r.review_status,
    r.priority,
    r.assigned_to,
    r.reviewed_by,
    r.reviewed_at,
    r.decision_reason,
    r.review_notes,
    r.published_at,
    r.unpublished_at,
    r.expired_at,
    r.created_at AS review_created_at,
    r.updated_at AS review_updated_at,
    d.detection_id,
    d.source_announcement_id,
    d.entity_id,
    d.is_nachlass_candidate,
    d.deceased_estate_signal_score,
    d.detection_reasoning_ar,
    d.source_excerpt,
    d.opportunity_window_start,
    d.opportunity_window_end,
    d.delete_after,
        CASE
            WHEN d.opportunity_window_end IS NULL THEN NULL::integer
            ELSE d.opportunity_window_end - CURRENT_DATE
        END AS days_remaining_in_window,
    ann.announcement_date,
    ann.case_number,
    ann.case_type,
    ann.court,
    ann.court_normalized,
    ann.announcement_type_hint,
    "left"(COALESCE(ann.announcement_text, ''::text), 600) AS announcement_text_preview
   FROM swift_v2.nachlass_opportunity_reviews r
     JOIN swift_v2.nachlass_detection_results d ON d.detection_id = r.detection_id
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.raw_insolvency_announcements ann ON ann.id::text = d.source_announcement_id;"},{"view":"v_neu_companies_missing_registry","def":" SELECT id,
    source_apify_case_id,
    entity_id,
    source_name,
    source_run_id,
    source_url,
    subject_type,
    proceeding_key,
    debtor_name,
    debtor_name_normalized,
    debtor_city,
    court,
    court_normalized,
    case_number,
    case_number_normalized,
    announcement_date,
    announcement_type_hint,
    announcement_text,
    content_hash,
    register_info,
    registry_court,
    registry_type,
    registry_number,
    registry_identity_key,
    legal_form_detected,
    insolvency_administrator,
    opening_date,
    claims_deadline,
    scraped_at,
    last_seen_at,
    retention_until,
    raw_json,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    entity_display_name,
    entity_match_status
   FROM swift_v2.v_neu_company_leads
  WHERE registry_identity_key IS NULL;"},{"view":"v_neu_company_leads","def":" SELECT s.id,
    s.source_apify_case_id,
    s.entity_id,
    s.source_name,
    s.source_run_id,
    s.source_url,
    s.subject_type,
    s.proceeding_key,
    s.debtor_name,
    s.debtor_name_normalized,
    s.debtor_city,
    s.court,
    s.court_normalized,
    s.case_number,
    s.case_number_normalized,
    s.announcement_date,
    s.announcement_type_hint,
    s.announcement_text,
    s.content_hash,
    s.register_info,
    s.registry_court,
    s.registry_type,
    s.registry_number,
    s.registry_identity_key,
    s.legal_form_detected,
    s.insolvency_administrator,
    s.opening_date,
    s.claims_deadline,
    s.scraped_at,
    s.last_seen_at,
    s.retention_until,
    s.raw_json,
    s.created_at,
    s.updated_at,
    e.display_name AS entity_display_name,
    e.match_status AS entity_match_status
   FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements s
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities e ON e.id = s.entity_id
  WHERE s.subject_type = 'company'::text;"},{"view":"v_neu_natural_person_active","def":" SELECT s.id,
    s.source_apify_case_id,
    s.entity_id,
    s.source_name,
    s.source_run_id,
    s.source_url,
    s.subject_type,
    s.proceeding_key,
    s.debtor_name,
    s.debtor_name_normalized,
    s.debtor_city,
    s.court,
    s.court_normalized,
    s.case_number,
    s.case_number_normalized,
    s.announcement_date,
    s.announcement_type_hint,
    s.announcement_text,
    s.content_hash,
    s.register_info,
    s.registry_court,
    s.registry_type,
    s.registry_number,
    s.registry_identity_key,
    s.legal_form_detected,
    s.insolvency_administrator,
    s.opening_date,
    s.claims_deadline,
    s.scraped_at,
    s.last_seen_at,
    s.retention_until,
    s.raw_json,
    s.created_at,
    s.updated_at,
    e.retention_until AS entity_retention_until
   FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements s
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities e ON e.id = s.entity_id
  WHERE s.subject_type = 'natural_person'::text AND (s.retention_until IS NULL OR s.retention_until >= now());"},{"view":"v_opportunity_review_queue","def":" SELECT r.review_id,
    r.publication_status,
    r.is_public_teaser,
    r.is_premium_report,
    r.reviewed_at,
    r.reviewed_by,
    r.review_notes,
    r.rejection_reason,
    r.created_at AS review_created_at,
    e.evaluation_id,
    e.validation_status AS eval_validation_status,
    e.acquisition_score,
    e.priority,
    e.phase_window,
    e.publish_recommendation,
    e.risk_flags,
    e.recommended_next_action,
    e.company_summary_ar,
    e.reasoning_ar,
    e.model_used,
    e.prompt_version,
    e.created_at AS eval_created_at,
    pe.id AS entity_id,
    pe.display_name,
    pe.city,
    pe.state AS bundesland,
    pe.legal_form,
    pe.registry_court,
    pe.registry_type,
    pe.registry_number,
    csr.result_id AS custom_search_result_id,
    csr.search_completeness,
    csr.business_question_answered,
    csr.financial_question_answered,
    enr.enrichment_id,
    enr.data_completeness AS enrichment_completeness
   FROM swift_v2.opportunity_publication_reviews r
     JOIN swift_v2.ai_opportunity_evaluations e ON e.evaluation_id = r.evaluation_id
     JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities pe ON pe.id = r.entity_id
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.entity_ai_company_enrichment enr ON enr.enrichment_id = e.enrichment_id
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.custom_search_results csr ON csr.result_id = e.custom_search_result_id
  WHERE pe.entity_type = 'company'::text AND pe.is_portal_publishable = true AND pe.data_sensitivity = 'normal'::text;"},{"view":"v_personal_data_retention_due","def":" SELECT id,
    entity_type,
    registry_identity_key,
    fallback_identity_key,
    display_name,
    normalized_name,
    legal_form,
    city,
    state,
    country,
    registry_court,
    registry_type,
    registry_number,
    source_priority,
    first_seen_at,
    last_seen_at,
    retention_until,
    is_portal_publishable,
    is_commercial_resale_allowed,
    data_sensitivity,
    match_status,
    metadata,
    created_at,
    updated_at
   FROM swift_v2.portal_entities
  WHERE (entity_type = ANY (ARRAY['natural_person'::text, 'unknown'::text])) AND retention_until IS NOT NULL AND retention_until < now();"},{"view":"v_portal_announcements","def":" SELECT id AS announcement_id,
    proceeding_key,
    court,
    case_number,
    case_type,
    announcement_date,
    announcement_type_hint,
    announcement_text,
    source_actor,
    source_url,
    content_hash,
    scraped_at,
    created_at
   FROM swift_v2.raw_insolvency_announcements r
  WHERE (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.portal_candidate_cases pcc
          WHERE pcc.proceeding_key = r.proceeding_key));"},{"view":"v_portal_candidate_list","def":" SELECT p.proceeding_key,
    p.company_case_id,

    pr.entity_id,
    pe.display_name AS company_name,
    pe.city,
    pe.state AS bundesland,

    pr.report_title_de,
    pr.public_teaser_de,
    pr.premium_report_de,
    pr.disclaimer_version,
    pr.source_transparency,
    opr.published_at,
    opr.is_premium_report
   FROM swift_v2.acquisition_opportunity_reports pr
     JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities pe ON pe.id = pr.entity_id
     JOIN swift_v2.opportunity_publication_reviews opr ON opr.report_id = pr.report_id
  WHERE opr.publication_status = 'published'::text AND opr.is_premium_report = true AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM swift_v2.portal_subscribers ps
          WHERE ps.user_id = auth.uid() AND ps.status = 'active_premium'::swift_v2.subscriber_status AND (ps.expires_at IS NULL OR ps.expires_at > now())));"},{"view":"v_public_company_detail_v2","def":" WITH hr_status AS (
         SELECT source_handelsregister_records.entity_id,
            bool_or(true) AS has_handelsregister,
            max(source_handelsregister_records.updated_at) AS handelsregister_last_seen
           FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records
          WHERE source_handelsregister_records.entity_id IS NOT NULL
          GROUP BY source_handelsregister_records.entity_id
        ), latest_ann AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.entity_id) s.entity_id,
            s.court,
            s.case_number,
            s.announcement_date,
            s.announcement_type_hint,
            s.announcement_text,
            s.source_url
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements s
          WHERE s.entity_id IS NOT NULL
          ORDER BY s.entity_id, s.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST, s.scraped_at DESC
        ), admin_info AS (
         SELECT s.entity_id,
            (array_agg(s.insolvency_administrator ORDER BY s.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST) FILTER (WHERE s.insolvency_administrator IS NOT NULL))[1] AS insolvency_administrator,
            (array_agg(s.insolvency_admin_firm ORDER BY s.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST) FILTER (WHERE s.insolvency_admin_firm IS NOT NULL))[1] AS insolvency_admin_firm,
            (array_agg(s.insolvency_admin_address ORDER BY s.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST) FILTER (WHERE s.insolvency_admin_address IS NOT NULL))[1] AS insolvency_admin_address,
            (array_agg(s.insolvency_admin_phone ORDER BY s.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST) FILTER (WHERE s.insolvency_admin_phone IS NOT NULL))[1] AS insolvency_admin_phone,
            (array_agg(s.insolvency_admin_email ORDER BY s.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST) FILTER (WHERE s.insolvency_admin_email IS NOT NULL))[1] AS insolvency_admin_email,
            (array_agg(s.opening_date ORDER BY s.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST) FILTER (WHERE s.opening_date IS NOT NULL))[1] AS opening_date,
            (array_agg(s.claims_deadline ORDER BY s.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST) FILTER (WHERE s.claims_deadline IS NOT NULL))[1] AS claims_deadline
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements s
          WHERE s.entity_id IS NOT NULL
          GROUP BY s.entity_id
        ), ann_timeline AS (
         SELECT s.entity_id,
            jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('announcement_date', s.announcement_date, 'announcement_type_hint', s.announcement_type_hint, 'court', s.court, 'case_number', s.case_number) ORDER BY s.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST) AS announcement_timeline
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements s
          WHERE s.entity_id IS NOT NULL
          GROUP BY s.entity_id
        ), published_op AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT ON (r.entity_id) r.entity_id,
            rep.report_id,
            rep.report_title_de,
            rep.public_teaser_de,
            r.is_premium_report,
            r.published_at
           FROM swift_v2.opportunity_publication_reviews r
             JOIN swift_v2.acquisition_opportunity_reports rep ON rep.report_id = r.report_id
          WHERE r.publication_status = 'published'::text AND r.is_public_teaser = true
          ORDER BY r.entity_id, r.published_at DESC
        ), web_research AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT ON (c.entity_id) c.entity_id,
                CASE
                    WHEN g.clean THEN c.business_activity_summary_de
                    ELSE NULL::text
                END AS web_summary_de,
                CASE
                    WHEN g.clean THEN c.industry_inferred
                    ELSE NULL::text
                END AS web_industry,
                CASE
                    WHEN g.clean THEN ( SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('title', e.value ->> 'title'::text, 'source', e.value ->> 'source'::text, 'url', e.value ->> 'url'::text)) AS jsonb_agg
                       FROM jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(c.activity_evidence, '[]'::jsonb)) e(value)
                      WHERE (e.value ->> 'url'::text) IS NOT NULL)
                    ELSE NULL::jsonb
                END AS web_sources,
                CASE
                    WHEN g.clean THEN c.search_completed_at::date
                    ELSE NULL::date
                END AS web_search_date
           FROM swift_v2.custom_search_results c
             CROSS JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT NOT (((COALESCE(c.business_activity_summary_de, ''::text) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(c.activity_evidence::text, ''::text)) ~* '(geboren|geburtsdatum|über den antrag|privatinsolvenz|verbraucherinsolvenz|nachlass)'::text OR ((COALESCE(c.business_activity_summary_de, ''::text) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(c.activity_evidence::text, ''::text)) ~ '(^| )geb\. '::text) AS clean) g
          ORDER BY c.entity_id, c.search_completed_at DESC NULLS LAST
        )
 SELECT pe.id AS entity_id,
    pe.display_name AS company_name,
    pe.legal_form AS rechtsform,
    pe.city,
    pe.state AS bundesland,
    pe.country,
    pe.registry_court,
    pe.registry_type,
    pe.registry_number,
    pe.registry_identity_key,
    la.court AS insolvenzgericht,
    la.case_number AS aktenzeichen,
    la.announcement_date AS publication_date,
    la.announcement_type_hint AS latest_announcement_type,
    "left"(COALESCE(la.announcement_text, ''::text), 1200) AS latest_announcement_preview,
    la.source_url AS latest_announcement_source_url,
    COALESCE(eip.phase, 'unknown'::text) AS phase_inferred,
    COALESCE(hr.has_handelsregister, false) AS has_handelsregister,
    hr.handelsregister_last_seen,
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(hr.has_handelsregister, false) THEN 'good'::text
            ELSE 'fair'::text
        END AS data_quality_status,
    at.announcement_timeline,
    po.report_id AS published_report_id,
    po.report_title_de AS published_report_title_de,
    po.public_teaser_de AS published_public_teaser_de,
    po.is_premium_report AS published_is_premium,
    po.published_at,
    jsonb_build_object('insolvenzbekanntmachungen', la.announcement_date IS NOT NULL, 'handelsregister', COALESCE(hr.has_handelsregister, false), 'ai_opportunity_published', po.report_id IS NOT NULL) AS data_source_badges,
    pe.last_seen_at AS last_updated,
    pe.first_seen_at,
    ai.insolvency_administrator,
    ai.opening_date,
    ai.claims_deadline,
    ai.insolvency_admin_firm,
    ai.insolvency_admin_address,
    ai.insolvency_admin_phone,
    ai.insolvency_admin_email,
    wr.web_summary_de,
    wr.web_industry,
    wr.web_sources,
    wr.web_search_date
   FROM swift_v2.portal_entities pe
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.v_entity_insolvency_phase eip ON eip.entity_id = pe.id
     LEFT JOIN hr_status hr ON hr.entity_id = pe.id
     LEFT JOIN latest_ann la ON la.entity_id = pe.id
     LEFT JOIN admin_info ai ON ai.entity_id = pe.id
     LEFT JOIN ann_timeline at ON at.entity_id = pe.id
     LEFT JOIN published_op po ON po.entity_id = pe.id
     LEFT JOIN web_research wr ON wr.entity_id = pe.id
  WHERE pe.entity_type = 'company'::text AND pe.is_portal_publishable = true AND pe.data_sensitivity = 'normal'::text AND (COALESCE(eip.phase, 'unknown'::text) <> ALL (ARRAY['late_stage'::text, 'dismissed_lack_of_assets'::text, 'masseunzulaenglichkeit'::text]));"},{"view":"v_public_company_search","def":" WITH hr_status AS (
         SELECT source_handelsregister_records.entity_id,
            bool_or(true) AS has_handelsregister
           FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records
          WHERE source_handelsregister_records.entity_id IS NOT NULL
          GROUP BY source_handelsregister_records.entity_id
        ), latest_ann AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT ON (source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.entity_id) source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.entity_id,
            source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.court,
            source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.case_number,
            source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.announcement_date,
            source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.announcement_type_hint
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements
          WHERE source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.entity_id IS NOT NULL
          ORDER BY source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.entity_id, source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST, source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.scraped_at DESC
        ), latest_ann_max AS (
         SELECT source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.entity_id,
            max(source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.announcement_date) AS latest_publication_date
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements
          WHERE source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.entity_id IS NOT NULL
          GROUP BY source_neu_insolvenz_announcements.entity_id
        )
 SELECT pe.id AS entity_id,
    pe.display_name AS company_name,
    pe.display_name,
    pe.city,
    pe.state AS bundesland,
    pe.legal_form AS rechtsform,
    pe.registry_court,
    pe.registry_type,
    pe.registry_number,

    lam.latest_publication_date,
    COALESCE(eip.phase, 'unknown'::text) AS phase_inferred,

        CASE
