        END AS data_quality_status
   FROM swift_v2.portal_entities pe
     LEFT JOIN swift_v2.v_entity_insolvency_phase eip ON eip.entity_id = pe.id
     LEFT JOIN hr_status hr ON hr.entity_id = pe.id
     LEFT JOIN latest_ann la ON la.entity_id = pe.id
     LEFT JOIN latest_ann_max lam ON lam.entity_id = pe.id
  WHERE pe.entity_type = 'company'::text AND pe.is_portal_publishable = true AND pe.data_sensitivity = 'normal'::text AND (COALESCE(eip.phase, 'unknown'::text) <> ALL (ARRAY['late_stage'::text, 'dismissed_lack_of_assets'::text, 'masseunzulaenglichkeit'::text]));"},{"view":"v_public_insolvency_statistics","def":" WITH hr_status AS (
         SELECT source_handelsregister_records.entity_id
           FROM swift_v2.source_handelsregister_records
          WHERE source_handelsregister_records.entity_id IS NOT NULL
          GROUP BY source_handelsregister_records.entity_id
        ), latest_ann AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.entity_id) s.entity_id,
            s.court_normalized,
            s.announcement_date
           FROM swift_v2.source_neu_insolvenz_announcements s
          WHERE s.entity_id IS NOT NULL
          ORDER BY s.entity_id, s.announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST
        ), base AS (
         SELECT pe.id AS entity_id,
            pe.city,
            pe.state AS bundesland,
            pe.legal_form,
            la.court_normalized AS court,
            la.announcement_date,
            eip.phase,
            hr.entity_id IS NOT NULL AS has_hr
           FROM swift_v2.portal_entities pe
             LEFT JOIN latest_ann la ON la.entity_id = pe.id
             LEFT JOIN swift_v2.v_entity_insolvency_phase eip ON eip.entity_id = pe.id
             LEFT JOIN hr_status hr ON hr.entity_id = pe.id
          WHERE pe.entity_type = 'company'::text AND pe.is_portal_publishable = true AND pe.data_sensitivity = 'normal'::text
        )
 SELECT jsonb_build_object('total_company_insolvencies', ( SELECT count(DISTINCT base.entity_id) AS count
           FROM base), 'handelsregister_verification_rate', ( SELECT
                CASE
                    WHEN count(DISTINCT base.entity_id) = 0 THEN 0::numeric
                    ELSE round(100.0 * count(DISTINCT base.entity_id) FILTER (WHERE base.has_hr)::numeric / count(DISTINCT base.entity_id)::numeric, 1)
                END AS round
           FROM base), 'by_bundesland', ( SELECT jsonb_object_agg(COALESCE(t.bundesland, 'unknown'::text), t.cnt) AS jsonb_object_agg
           FROM ( SELECT base.bundesland,
                    count(DISTINCT base.entity_id) AS cnt
                   FROM base
                  GROUP BY base.bundesland) t), 'by_court_top_20', ( SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('court', t.court, 'count', t.cnt) ORDER BY t.cnt DESC) AS jsonb_agg
           FROM ( SELECT base.court,
                    count(DISTINCT base.entity_id) AS cnt
                   FROM base
                  WHERE base.court IS NOT NULL
                  GROUP BY base.court
                  ORDER BY (count(DISTINCT base.entity_id)) DESC
                 LIMIT 20) t), 'by_month_last_12', ( SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('month', t.mon, 'count', t.cnt) ORDER BY t.mon) AS jsonb_agg
           FROM ( SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month'::text, base.announcement_date::timestamp with time zone), 'YYYY-MM'::text) AS mon,
                    count(DISTINCT base.entity_id) AS cnt
                   FROM base
                  WHERE base.announcement_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - '1 year'::interval)
                  GROUP BY (to_char(date_trunc('month'::text, base.announcement_date::timestamp with time zone), 'YYYY-MM'::text))
                  ORDER BY (to_char(date_trunc('month'::text, base.announcement_date::timestamp with time zone), 'YYYY-MM'::text))) t), 'by_legal_form', ( SELECT jsonb_object_agg(COALESCE(t.legal_form, 'unknown'::text), t.cnt) AS jsonb_object_agg
           FROM ( SELECT base.legal_form,
                    count(DISTINCT base.entity_id) AS cnt
                   FROM base
                  GROUP BY base.legal_form) t), 'top_cities_20', ( SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('city', t.city, 'count', t.cnt) ORDER BY t.cnt DESC) AS jsonb_agg
           FROM ( SELECT base.city,
                    count(DISTINCT base.entity_id) AS cnt
                   FROM base
                  WHERE base.city IS NOT NULL
                  GROUP BY base.city
                  ORDER BY (count(DISTINCT base.entity_id)) DESC
                 LIMIT 20) t), 'by_phase', ( SELECT jsonb_object_agg(COALESCE(t.phase, 'unknown'::text), t.cnt) AS jsonb_object_agg
           FROM ( SELECT base.phase,
                    count(DISTINCT base.entity_id) AS cnt
                   FROM base
                  GROUP BY base.phase) t), 'generated_at', now()) AS statistics;"},{"view":"v_public_published_opportunities","def":" SELECT rep.report_id,
    pe.id AS entity_id,
    pe.display_name AS company_name,
    pe.city,
    pe.state AS bundesland,
    pe.legal_form AS rechtsform,
    rep.report_title_de,
    rep.public_teaser_de,
    rep.disclaimer_version,
    r.is_premium_report,
    r.published_at,
    jsonb_build_object('evaluation_score', rep.source_transparency -> 'evaluation_score'::text, 'priority', rep.source_transparency -> 'priority'::text, 'risk_flags', rep.source_transparency -> 'risk_flags'::text) AS source_transparency_public
   FROM swift_v2.opportunity_publication_reviews r
     JOIN swift_v2.acquisition_opportunity_reports rep ON rep.report_id = r.report_id
     JOIN swift_v2.portal_entities pe ON pe.id = r.entity_id
  WHERE r.publication_status = 'published'::text AND r.is_public_teaser = true AND pe.entity_type = 'company'::text AND pe.is_portal_publishable = true AND pe.data_sensitivity = 'normal'::text;"},{"view":"v_retention_purge_queue","def":" SELECT 'natural_person_cases'::text AS scope,
